error.signature: IWDG reset detected: system restarted by independent watchdog timeout

verdict.summary: Watchdog timer reset the MCU because firmware did not refresh it in time. Infinite loop, deadlock, or blocking delay.

dead_ends.why_fails: Watchdog exists for safety/reliability. Disabling it hides the root cause; system hangs without recovery.

dead_ends.action: Increase watchdog timeout to maximum value
dead_ends.why_fails: Masks the problem temporarily. If code hangs for even longer, the crash returns.

workarounds.action: Check reset source register to confirm watchdog reset
workarounds.how: if (RCC->CSR & RCC_CSR_IWDGRSTF) { /* IWDG caused reset */ } RCC->CSR |= RCC_CSR_RMVF;

workarounds.action: Add watchdog refresh in all long-running loops and blocking waits
workarounds.how: while (wait_for_sensor()) { HAL_IWDG_Refresh(&hiwdg); }  // prevent timeout during legitimate waits

workarounds.action: Use a dedicated low-priority RTOS task to feed the watchdog
workarounds.how: If lowest-priority task runs, all higher-priority tasks are not starving the system.
